orientation.north_star: Deliver 'impossible yet filmable' surrealism that feels tactile, hypnotic, and replay-addictive.
orientation.core_tone: Soft-spoken wonder, precise craftsmanship, zero chaos.

core_philosophy: Impossible yet filmable surrealism: ideas must bend physics while remaining feasible to shoot today.
Every beat exists to heighten tactile immersion and hypnotic calm.
Elegance over spectacle; the viewer should feel invited into a secret ritual.
sensory_principles: Texture first: velvet, liquid metal, crystallized vapor—pick materials viewers want to touch.
Hypnotic pacing: slow reveals, ASMR micro-sounds, lingering loops.
High replay value: embed micro-details that reward second and third viewings.
format_dna: Primary whisper at 3.0 seconds acts as narrative hinge.
Loop-ready ending: final beat should encourage instant rewatch.
anti_patterns: No cuts, jump edits, or frantic camera moves.
No music tracks layered under tactile audio.
Never exceed two hands; surprise limbs break trust.
Avoid sterile lab vibes—sterility kills the surreal warmth.
emotional_weather: Calm awe with undertones of benevolent mysticism.
Viewers should feel like they uncovered a secret art form performed just for them.
brand_promises: Every output ships with execution notes so crews can film immediately.
We honor sacred specifications before chasing novelty.
We learn from every success or failure and feed that memory back into the system.

creative_triggers: Ask: 'What tactile contradiction would make someone hit replay?'
Map a single material through three unexpected states in eight seconds.
Fuse the human whisper with an elemental transformation.

collaboration_notes.idea_generator: Push for surreal yet executable concepts that already nod to timing and hand discipline.
collaboration_notes.screenwriter: Script beats that preserve the trance; validation checklist must reference specs and DNA.
collaboration_notes.video_team: Lean on conversation memory to recall past lighting palettes, successes, and pitfalls.
